title: mysql
html:
mysql

Library Load

The following loads the `/path/to/lib.so` shared object.

mysql --default-auth ../../../../../path/to/lib

Shell

mysql -e '\! /bin/sh'
excerpt: mysql Library Load The following loads the `/path/to/lib.so` shared object. mysql --default-auth ../../../../../path/to/lib Shell mysql -e '\! /bin/sh'
